race.comment: RICH MINX (1) resumes after five months away and has an excellent record on the poly surface at the Gold Coast. The big weight is a challenge, but she races well fresh and looks capable of making a winning return. JUNGLE FEVER (9) made an encouraging comeback when runner-up here just over a fortnight ago and boasts a terrific record at this track with multiple wins and placings from five starts. He shapes as one of the hardest runners to beat. THANKYOU HENRY (2) didn't show his best form last campaign but returns off a recent trial win and is more than capable of measuring up if close to his peak. DESIAH (5) also resumes and from a favourable draw in a small field can work into the minor money.
